scripts.update:grammar:antlr4: mkdir -p grammar/antlr4 && curl -L https://raw.githubusercontent.com/antlr/grammars-v4/master/sql/trino/TrinoLexer.g4 -o grammar/antlr4/TrinoLexer.g4 && curl -L https://raw.githubusercontent.com/antlr/grammars-v4/master/sql/trino/TrinoParser.g4 -o grammar/antlr4/TrinoParser.g4
scripts.generate:antlr4: antlr-ng -Dlanguage=TypeScript -l true -v true -o generated/antlr4 grammar/antlr4/TrinoLexer.g4 grammar/antlr4/TrinoParser.g4
